atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain following a drop injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports sustaining a right foot injury after dropping a landscape brick on it yesterday.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports initial soreness following the injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports continued working with weight on the foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports more significant pain today.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports swelling associated with the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness associated with the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a previous ankle injury twenty years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports resolution of the previous ankle injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional soreness and swelling with the previous ankle injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports surgery on the other ankle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies taking any medications for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports having been to a new landscape warehouse recently with his wife.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals bruising on the bottom and top of the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient exhibits dorsal displacement of the second metatarsal

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient exhibits separation of the first and second metatarsal bases

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient exhibits bony fragments

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An MRI will be ordered

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Surgical intervention is likely necessary

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be scheduled for outpatient surgery tomorrow morning

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be discharged home that evening

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment will be scheduled in 24 hours post-procedure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment will be scheduled in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be placed on crutches

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be restricted from weight-bearing on the affected foot for six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Ambulation will be advanced gradually based on healing and tolerance
